subtitle.ja: 人差し指の構えから始めます。右手の親指、人差し指、小指を向こう側に1回転させて糸をねじります
subtitle.en: From Opening A, twist the right thumb, index finger, and little finger once away to twist the strings.

subtitle.ja: 左手の親指、人差し指、小指を向こう側に1回転させて糸をねじります
subtitle.en: Twist the left thumb, index finger, and little finger once away to twist the strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指で、人差し指手前の糸を下に引き下げます
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, pull down the near index-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指の腹で、人差し指向こうの2本の糸を上から取り、人差し指を親指手前の糸に乗せます
subtitle.en: With both index-finger pads, move over and pick down the two far index-finger strings, and place the index fingers over the near thumb strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指で、親指手前の糸を上から取ります。人差し指にかかっていた2本の糸は自然に外れます
subtitle.en: With both index fingers, move over and pick down the near thumb strings; the two strings formerly on the index fingers fall away naturally.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指で、小指向こうの糸を下から取り、親指の輪から引き出します
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, pick up from below the far little-finger strings and draw them out of the thumb loops.

subtitle.ja: 左右の小指の糸を外します
左右の人差し指上の輪に親指を下から入れ、輪を親指に移します
subtitle.en: Insert both thumbs up into the upper index-finger loops and transfer the loops to the thumbs.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指と小指の指先を合わせ、親指上の輪を小指に移します
subtitle.en: Bring the thumb and little-finger tips together on both hands, and transfer the thumb loops to the little fingers.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指の糸を外します
左右の親指と人差し指の指先を合わせ、親指の輪を人差し指に移します
subtitle.en: Bring the thumb and index-finger tips together on both hands, and transfer the thumb loops to the index fingers.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指を小指の輪に下から入れて、中央に向かって伸びる4本の糸を取ります。人差し指の糸を外します
subtitle.en: Insert both thumbs up into the little-finger loops and pick up the four strings running toward the center. Release the index-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指の背で、親指向こうの糸を取ります。人差し指から糸が外れないように親指で押さえ、両手を広げて完成です
subtitle.en: With the backs of both index fingers, pick up the far thumb strings. Press them with the thumbs so they do not slip off, draw both hands apart, and complete the figure.
